---
title: "Agnes Beatrice Jane Thicknesse"
---

## Agnes Beatrice Jane Thicknesse

**Dates:** (1857-1944)

**Maiden name:** (Argles)

### Description

sister of Edith Argles, known as \'Dolly\'

### Biography

She married (1888) as his second wife, the Rt.Rev. Francis Thicknesse (1829-1921), appointed in that year the first suffragan Bishop of Leicester. As a child Dolly Argles was one of the correspondents of Lewis Carroll.

### Letters

- Letter from July 17th 1879
- Letter from June 5th [1872] [[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
